author: CasaOS Team
description: NZBGet can run on almost any device - classic PC, NAS, media player, SAT-receiver, WLAN-router, etc. The download area provides precompiled binaries for Windows, macOS, Linux (compatible with many CPUs and platform variants), FreeBSD and Android. For other platforms the program can be compiled from sources.

tips.before_install:
Default Account

| Username | Password |
| -------- | -------- |
| nzbget   | tegbzn6789 |

release_notes:
- NZBGet 25.4 adds TLS 1.3 cipher suite support through the ServerX.Cipher option.
- The web UI search bar is enabled on small screens.
- Fixes include Scan script API handling, RSS feed category application from filter rules, JSON value parsing, and the testserver API method.
title: Nzbget
